description:
Post-finalization spec revision 2026-06-05 (bl-2e26 §12/§13). Amends landed bl-be5f ('§12/§13 prime + sync: run->engine dispatch, trail walk, pointer', commit 82e32b8) — assume it landed; this corrects it.

WHY: with config no longer layering and the store named directly by tasks_branch, the trail's every job (find-store, sync-target, install-source, doctor-resolves) collapses to one indirection. No trail, no terminus, no operating, no transitive discovery, no chains.

WHAT (src/ trail/substrate/checkout/sync modules):
- REMOVE the trail walk (src/trail.rs walk + its callers) as a CONFIG/store-location mechanism. 'Where are the tasks?' = config.tasks_branch, read directly.
- bl sync (no arg) syncs the STORE: ff-only/union of tasks_branch with its configured remote. bl sync <branch> syncs a named branch. Moves task state ONLY.
- Config NEVER syncs (landing-local, changes only by install). sync structurally cannot re-home config or activate code. There is no topology to refresh beyond tasks_branch (which is config).
- prime = ensure landing+store substrate, sync the store, bootstrap-on-miss; idempotent converge. No operating/ resolution. Delivery prime.post worktree re-materialization unchanged.
- The landing is never a sync target (it is single-owner, upstream-less by construction, §4).
- 'Stealth' = a local tasks_branch (no remote), not a mode.
title: Greenfield §12/§13: dissolve trail walk; sync the store branch (tasks_branch) with its remote; config never syncs
